message:
fix(rust): replace unwraps with safe error handling and update tests

- daemon/client.rs: Replace unwrap() on stream connection with
  ok_or_else() returning DaemonError::Unavailable instead of panicking
- search/query.rs: Replace three unwrap() calls on pending_or_group.pop()
  with unwrap_or_default() to prevent panic on empty vec in FTS5
  transpilation; clean up dedup pagination test to assert directly now
  that global deduplication is fixed (remove dead binding and conditional)
- ui/app.rs: Add required columns (kind, created_at, updated_at) to
  test INSERT for agents table to match current schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
